entities.name: INTEGRATED PEST MANAGEMENT
entities.description: A strategy for managing pests using multiple methods including host plant resistance

entities.name: HOST PLANT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to resist attack by insect pests

entities.name: INSECTS
entities.description: Pests that attack crop plants and cause production losses

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE TRAITS
entities.description: Traits controlled by several loci, often associated with conventional host-plant resistance

entities.name: GENETIC TRANSFORMATION TECHNIQUES
entities.description: Methods used to clone and insert specific genes into crop plants to confer resistance

entities.name: GENES
entities.description: Segments of DNA inserted into plants to provide resistance to insect pests

entities.name: DELTA-ENDOTOXINS
entities.description: Toxins derived from Bacillus thuringiensis used to confer insect resistance in transgenic plants

entities.name: BACILLUS THURINGIENSIS
entities.description: A bacterium that serves as the source of delta-endotoxins for crop resistance

entities.name: PROTEASE INHIBITORS
entities.description: Plant-derived genes that inhibit protease enzymes in insects to confer resistance

entities.name: ENZYMES
entities.description: Plant-derived genes used to confer resistance to insect pests

entities.name: PLANT LECTINS
entities.description: Plant-derived genes used to confer resistance to insect pests

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A crop plant into which resistance genes have been inserted
